g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does self-attention work in transformer layers?')
sendPrompt('What happens in the first transformer layer?')

svg.text: Similarity between two vectors: cos(θ) = A·B (when L2-normalised, dot product = cosine similarity)
Score range −1 to +1 — only rank ordering is meaningful, not absolute values
